Text.Page:
A {@LinkCreature:25#2091$$Lokian Zealot} ambushed me in the {@Rgn:25003$$Transepts}. I escaped, but lost a small box in my rush.

The box contains a ring for my girl back home. Could you recover it for me? I'm in no shape to face a Lokian again.

This is it! This is the one. It’s more precious to me than anything.

I don’t know how I can repay you. Thank you so much.
Please help me. It’s a very dear item to me.
